title: The State of Italian Business in Malaysia
summary: An open, free snapshot of Italian companies and institutions operating in Malaysia, by sector and city. No membership, no paywall, free to cite.

sources.name: Italian Chamber of Commerce in Malaysia

methodology: Counts are compiled from the Italian Chamber of Commerce member roster, ICE records, and SSM registrations, de-duplicated by company. Figures are point-in-time as of the edition date and labelled where partial. Corrections welcome.
dataStatus: PLACEHOLDER — sample data for layout only. Replace src/data/companies.json with the real cleaned seed list and clear Pre-Build Gate #4 (number defensibility) BEFORE showing this to any institution.
